description: Benchmark specs for scripts/bench-vibe-coder.ts. Each spec is a real app request with a bar the workflow must clear to count as a pass (minimum files, required paths, expected features). Intentionally hand-curated across difficulty tiers so regressions are visible across specs.

specs.description: A simple todo list app with Next.js App Router. In-memory state (no database). User can add, check off, and delete todos. Tailwind CSS styling. No auth.
A Next.js blog where posts are stored in Postgres via Prisma. Home page lists latest 10 posts, clicking a post shows its full content. No auth. No create-post UI.
A Next.js landing page with a login form using Supabase Auth. After login, redirect to /dashboard which shows the user's email. Tailwind + shadcn-style components.
Next.js app with a full CRUD REST API for a 'Contact' resource (name, email, phone). Create/list/get/update/delete endpoints under /api/contacts. Prisma for persistence. No UI.
A metrics dashboard that displays a line chart of daily active users. Data from a /api/metrics endpoint that returns last 30 days of mock data. Uses Recharts. Tailwind styling. No auth.
